heroHeadline: Earth Day 2026: Global Reforestation Push as GGW Funding Gap Exposed
heroSubtitle: 10,000+ Earth Day events mobilize global tree planting as NPR investigation finds only 13% of $19B pledged for the Great Green Wall has been disbursed; REMAR €5.5M Caribbean mangrove project launches; Odisha's 'fishbone channel' method emerges as a mangrove restoration model.
footerNote: Data sourced from UNEP, FAO, UNCCD, IUCN, WRI Global Forest Watch, NPR, and Tier 2 science outlets. Pledge figures reflect commitments; verified restoration is substantially lower.
